justification.irreducibility_depth: The extension is strictly syntax-only and carries external sequence mapping tags that cannot be modeled as core causal primitives.
justification.ontological_neutrality: Does not inject or alter any core diagnostic, lattice, or inference semantics; tags are strictly treated as metadata.
justification.provider_abstraction_purity: Translates external protein sequence configurations to clean neutral intermediate AST descriptors.
justification.primitive_necessity: Avoids expanding base compiler grammar and encapsulates all protein sequence matching attributes outside core keywords.
justification.sunsetability_confidence: Can be entirely excised or removed dynamically without leaving any lingering side-effects or compiling artifacts in base programs.
